title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Megan Wallis 5 February 2025
body: "This Order is made in relation to complaints that Miss Wallis, in her capacity as Office Holder:  1, failed to take reasonable steps to ensure the following cases were progressed in a timely way: - a bankruptcy estate between 14 June 2018 and 14 October 2018; and/or - a liquidation between 21 December 2016 and 14 October 2018; and/or - a liquidation between 13 February 2017 and 14 October 2018  2, failed to take reasonable steps to ensure the following cases were progressed in a timely way: - a bankruptcy estate between 15 October 2018 and 18 October 2023; and/or - a liquidation between 15 October 2018 and 16 March 2023; and/or - a liquidation between "
